channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Manhole cover broken on footpath inbetween number 9 and number 11, 11th March
item.description:
Manhole cover broken on footpath inbetween number 9 and number 11 The Chine, N21 School nearby therefore safety hazard, needs to be repaired asap.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Chine, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bags of rubbish, 11th March
item.description:
Dumped bags of rubbish not cleared for over 2 months. Over the weeks more bags dumped at same location next to railings. Railings are next to house that has a fridge in the front garden for about 6 months. Council's weekly cleanse is missing clearing the rubbish.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Battery Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Zebra crossing, 11th March
item.description:
Zebra crossing markings all faded. Needs repainting. On queensway.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queensway, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Builders from 59 cadet drive left waste on main road, 11th March
item.description:
There was construction work going on at 59 cadet drive and a skip was present. However, the skip got too full so the waste was left next to it. When the skip was collected they did not collect the waste left on the road. Please arrange for enforcement of fly tipping as the builders should have removed their own waste after construction finished.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cadet Drive, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping by 135 Whinchat Road, 11th March
item.description:
Trolley of rubbish, mattresses, and household waste left down the side of property. This is a possible health and safety risk
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nuthatch Gardens, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive pothole Essex Road/Britannia Row, 11th March
item.description:
Large pothole in southbound bus lane on Essex Road junction of Britannia Row, needs fixing urgently as it is causing houses nearby to shake as buses go over. Islington council is responsible for this as stated by TfL.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 64, Essex Road, Islington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish thrown out of the window, 11th March
item.description:
Maybe stop pretending you fix issues just to resolve reports without doing anything Https://reportaproblem.hackney.gov.uk/report/9082836

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden hedge/tree jutting out over pavement area by over 2 feet. Forcing public to potentially walk in the street., 11th March
item.description:
This has been reported in the past when owners of the house allowed the street sign to be obscured. It is noticeable that they still have not cut the hedge back, onto their property/land, although they now ensure that the street sign is now visible. This tree is a hazard and takes up too much of the public pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brookmill Road, Deptford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on walls on surrey canal path, 11th March
item.description:
Please remove all these massive graffiti tags. needs to be done regularly

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Compton Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping by builders, 11th March
item.description:
The builders working on number 58 have dumped these white goods outside the property. They have been blocking the pavement for buggies and wheelchairs for several days.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Margarets Terrace, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus shelter graffitied, 11th March
item.description:
White tag on the back of the shelter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southampton Way, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Next to bins outside 1A / next to gate, 11th March
item.description:
Someone dashed some strange wooden box there

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Streatley Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car not moved for atleast 2months, 11th March
item.description:
This car has been parked for nearly 2months it has not moved also MOT has expired which makes it illegal please could it be removed as it is taking up space making it hard for permit holders to park
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nightingale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Plastics dumped in grass are of elcot avenue, 11th March
item.description:
Plastic sheets, plastic bags and plastic bottles and flytipped onto the area and spewing onto the pathway. please pick up. thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 103, Friary Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A section of road outside of 111 to 117 Priory Park Road, 11th March
item.description:
Several potholes across a section of the road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bin bag on pavement, 11th March
item.description:
Abandoned bin bag on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Palace View, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Estate agents board placed on Green, 11th March
item.description:
Estate agents board placed on shoulder of mutton green

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellegrove Road, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bins and trolley, 11th March
item.description:
Please remove all of these. The overflowing bins will only encourage more littering, including the already disgraceful state of the church grounds. Thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albion Way, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The hedge takes up too much pavement space, 11th March
item.description:
The hedge takes up at least 50% of the pavement space and when a vehicle is parked there it’s almost impossible to pass without being brushed by the hedge
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Longbury Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hedge taking up too much pavement space, 11th March
item.description:
The hedge is taking up at least 50% of the footpath space at the side of the house that leads to Chipperfield Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Longbury Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
